name: kie-mcp
display_name: KIE.ai — image, video, and music generation
description: Generate images, videos, and music with the latest AI models — Seedance, Kling, GPT Image 2, Nano Banana, Suno — through KIE.ai.
long_description: Let Claude generate media with any model on KIE.ai. Make a 9:16 video with Seedance 2.0 Pro. Edit a product photo with Nano Banana 2. Render a 5-panel storyboard with GPT Image 2. Compose a soundtrack with Suno V4. The server is a thin HTTP shim, so when KIE adds a new model tomorrow, nothing here needs updating — Claude reads the JSON shape from https://docs.kie.ai and constructs the call itself. Three generic tools (kie_post, kie_get, kie_run_and_wait) cover everything KIE offers, present and future.

kie_api_key.title: KIE.ai API Key
kie_api_key.description: Your KIE.ai API key. Get one at https://kie.ai

tools.name: kie_get
tools.description: GET from any KIE endpoint (typically polling).

tools.name: kie_run_and_wait
tools.description: Submit a task and poll until done.
